title: Case processing time for criminal cases dealt with at courts in Northern Ireland 2024 to 2025
body: "Report presenting data on the average case processing time for criminal cases dealt with in Crown and magistrates’ courts in Northern Ireland for the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025. It provides an overview of the time taken for a case to be dealt with at court, from the date that case began its journey through the criminal justice system, based on a start point of the date the offence was reported to, or detected by, the police. "
